subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That which thou didst write was perused. All was correct, conformable to reality, and precisely so [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید جمیع عین صواب و مطابق واقع و همانست
subcodes.subjects: @conduct in finance and business, @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
